violations.text: The freezer located in the refrigerator/freezer area was not in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

The area beneath the 3-bay sink is in poor repair, with bottom cracked and the fiberboard gouged. The back wall has a gap, obscuring where the pipes come in. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024

The Person in charge did not assure compliance with critical code requirements. Management's plan for assessing, monitoring, and controlling foodborne disease hazards is inadequate. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
No allergy statement posted. English Food Allergies What You Need to Know English Food Allergy Reactions Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024
The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer is to be cleaned and sanitized before use. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

Chicken salad (52), egg salad (48), turkey (45), cut tomatoes (44), and cheeses (47) were observed held above 41 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Chicken salad was voluntarily disposed. All other foods moved to alternate refrigeration. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

Bagels, cookies, and yogurt parfaits packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 01/11/2024

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by rodent droppings in the area beneath the sink, and the shelves in the soup alcove. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PCS unknown. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

Lettuce was not washed before being cut. Raw fruits and vegetables must be thoroughly washed in water to remove soil and other contaminants before they are cut. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

Utensils in the kitchen are displayed with the food contact surface up. Utensils are to be stored so that only the handles are touched by employees and consumers if consumer self-service is provided. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the kitchen, and drawers and cupboards in the coffee area. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024
The freezer in the combo refrigerator/freezer was not in good repair, nonfunctional during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024

The prep unit was not in good repair, not holding food at 41 degrees or colder.All foods requiring refrigeration were relocated to another refrigeration unit.The prep unit is not to be used for foods requiring refrigeration until it is functioning properly. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit, slicer, slow cooker, and beverage refrigerator door tracks have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 01/04/2024

The area beneath the 3 bay sink is in poor repair, with the bottom cracked and the fiberboard gouged out.The back wall has a gap, obscuring where the pipes come in. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024
A light bulb in the dining area was nonfunctional during inspection. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 01/18/2024
